22342023.title: Stephen Biesty
22342023.extract: Stephen Biesty (; 27 January 1961 – 14 February 2024) was a British illustrator. Biesty is considered a master of cross section. He frequently collaborated with Richard Platt, who wrote the text for the majority of his books, which covered a wide range of informative cross sections aimed at adults and children, all published by Dorling Kindersley.
